ValidationRule.description: Enforce the user to provide expected target contract start date when Opportunity Stage is moved to Contract Request
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Contract Request"), ISPICKVAL(Request_Stage_Progression__c,'Request Progression to Contract Request/MOU Approved') ) , ISBLANK(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: No Close Date, to request propossal you have to provide target contract start date on the Opportunity
